result.evidence_summary: Ylläs-Levi Hiihto is a real annual cross-country ski marathon in Finland from Ylläs to Levi (55-70km), confirmed by its official website with detailed race info, organization, and 2026 dates (April 10-11). It is listed as a member of Worldloppet and Euroloppet series, and promoted on Levi's tourism site. No past results in snippets, but event infrastructure including timing service is described.
